title: Handling of rdf_strlang_impl in OPTIONAL
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE persons (id Int32, first_name String);
CREATE TABLE functions (id Int32, function_name String);
INSERT INTO functions (id, function_name) VALUES (1, 'Developer'), (2, NULL);
SELECT p.first_name, IF(isNull(f.function_name), NULL, concat(f.function_name, ' (nl)')) AS function_label FROM persons p LEFT JOIN functions f ON p.id = f.id;
key_bug_features: BIND with STRLANG on optional NULL variable
